mentions.note: Senior housing REIT; 202% 3-year total return; 85% senior housing, 100K+ units; aggressive acquisitions working well; 46x 2026 FFO—most expensive in group; 37x last year FFO; lowest dividend yield (~1.5%); good story but pricier than Ventas.

Largest senior housing REIT in 3-year uptrend; 40-week moving average shows strong institutional buying on dips; demographic tailwind (80+ population +30% by 2030) drives secular growth; buy on weakness, room to run higher.
Senior housing REIT in a clean three-year uptrend with institutional buying at the 40-week moving average; buy here and leave room to add on pullbacks.
